title: mentha × triplex
intro: Mentha × triplex, also known as brown mint or triple mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is a natural cross between Mentha aquatica and Mentha × smithiana. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha × triplex include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Mentha × triplex include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
